    Modules Example Report

Function reference

All functions

concat_tables()
Concatenate tables
crossref()
Crossref info
demodir()
Get demo directory of grobid XML files
demopdf()
Get demo PDF file
demoxml()
Get demo XML file
gpt()
Query ChatGPT
ml()
Machine Learning Classifier
module_list()
List modules
module_report()
Report from module output
module_run()
Run a module
paper()
Create a paper object
papercheck_app()
Launch Shiny App
pdf2grobid()
Convert a PDF to Grobid XML
read_grobid()
Get paper from grobid XML file
report()
Create a report
retractionwatch
RetractionWatch data
search_text()
Search text
set_gpt_max_calls()
Set the maximum number of calls to ChatGPT
stats()
Check Stats
